title: elymus elymoides
intro: Elymus elymoides, also known as blue grama grass, is a perennial grass native to North America that belongs to the Poaceae family. The medicinal properties of Elymus elymoides include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and alleviate respiratory problems. Elymus elymoides can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat these health conditions.
